 {"id":"bd-2v7j","title":"Expose manifest metadata in setup endpoints","description":"Goal:
- Extend /setup endpoints to return manifest metadata (categories, tags, version).

Scope:
- Ensure public-safe fields only.
- Update response schema if needed.

Tests / Verification (detailed logging required):
- Contract: bd-2lvp.
- E2E: bd-1uog (setup UI reflects metadata).

Definition of Done:
- /setup/tools includes manifest-derived metadata; readiness uses same source.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:25:43.369125811Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T17:03:05.142818956Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T17:03:05.142770204Z","close_reason":"Completed","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["api","integration","setup"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2v7j","depends_on_id":"bd-1hac","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:25:43.394223138Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2v7j","depends_on_id":"bd-20kj","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:26:25.610740450Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2v7j","depends_on_id":"bd-23qe","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:26:26.716025536Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2wwp","title":"Tests: NTM backpressure + rate limiting","description":"Goal:\n- Add tests for NTM ingest backpressure/throttling.\n\nScope:\n- Rate limit behavior, batching, and critical event delivery.\n- Structured logging assertions for throttling decisions.\n\nDefinition of Done:\n- Tests validate rate limits and do not drop critical events.","notes":"Implementation:
- Extended apps/gateway/src/__tests__/ntm-ws-bridge.service.test.ts
- Added 9 new tests in "Backpressure behavior" section:
  - High volume handling: burst of 100 events, sustained load, event order
  - Rate limit edge cases: under limit, limit+1, empty queue after flush
  - Debounce and rate limit interaction
  - Stats tracking: lastFlushTime updates, accurate after multiple ops
- Total: 21 tests pass (was 12, added 9)
- Tests validate rate limits and proper event dropping behavior","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:49:01.613349781Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T21:41:44.346975408Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T21:41:44.346928530Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ntm","performance","tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2wwp","depends_on_id":"bd-284u","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:49:01.638783038Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2wwp","depends_on_id":"bd-pbt2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:49:17.809555600Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2xj3","title":"Map manifest optional/tags/phase into readiness scoring","description":"Goal:
- Map manifest optional/enabled_by_default/tags/phase into readiness scoring and install ordering.

Scope:
- Define which tags imply "required" vs "recommended" vs "optional" in readiness summary.
- Expose phase ordering for UI install guidance.

Tests / Verification (detailed logging required):
- Harness: bd-a1jg (readiness/install scenarios).
- E2E: bd-1uog (UI grouping + ordering).

Definition of Done:
- Readiness output includes required/recommended/optional lists and phase ordering.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:48:01.212896043Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-23T03:41:53.236258366Z","closed_at":"2026-01-23T03:41:53.235672983Z","close_reason":"Implemented: Added tool categorization (required/recommended/optional) and phase ordering to ReadinessStatus.  {"id":"bd-2yw3","title":"Unit tests for manifest provenance fields","description":"Goal:
- Add focused UNIT tests validating manifest provenance fields are correctly populated.

Scope:
- Test that path, hash, version are set in readiness responses (unit level).
- Verify fallback provenance indicates built-in registry source.
- Isolated fixture-based tests for provenance serialization.
- Detailed logging assertions for provenance field correctness.

Relationship to bd-1kkl:
- This bead covers unit-level isolation testing.
- bd-1kkl covers integration scenarios (refresh, fallback behavior).

Definition of Done:
- Unit tests pass and validate provenance is always present in all code paths.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-22T18:36:39.058812680Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-22T18:50:25.595173090Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["acfs","tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2yw3","depends_on_id":"bd-29qb","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-22T18:37:17.849785045Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"bd-31kw","title":"Decision: extend NTM robot command coverage","description":"Goal:
- Decide whether to integrate NTM robot commands beyond status/health/files/context/metrics.

Candidates:
- --robot-plan, --robot-graph, --robot-palette, --robot-dashboard, --robot-terse.

Definition of Done:
- Decision note with explicit include/exclude and rationale.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:00:04.554151937Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-22T18:50:47.098448166Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["audit","design","ntm"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-31kw","depends_on_id":"bd-1khz","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:00:29.730080282Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-31kw","depends_on_id":"bd-284u","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-22T18:50:47.098359719Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-31kw","depends_on_id":"bd-3oop","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:00:04.591431464Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
